name: A General Equilibrium Theory of Orchestrated AI Agent Systems

description: arXiv:2602.21255v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We establish a general equilibrium theory for systems of large language model (LLM) agents operating under centralized orchestration. The framework is a production economy in the sense of Arrow-Debreu (1954), extended to infinite-dimensional commodity spaces following Bewley (1972). Each LLM agent is modeled as a firm whose production se...
author: Jean-Philippe Garnier (Br.AI.K)
